case_title: DAVID LINDSAY MONROE VS. MICHAIEL BOVENES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONROE, DAVID LINDSAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOVENES, MICHAIEL $3,290.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,370.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - GRANTED.

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENT OF $200, ON THE 28TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING AUGUST 28, 2014 UNTIL DECEMBER 28, 2015, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $70. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL.
